title: Rank 5 Region
content:
Rank 5 Region
 is the location where the rank 5 sects of 
Cloud Sea Star System
 are situated.

The average cultivation level of a high-level member of a rank 5 sect is usually at the early-stage of 
Nirvana Shatterer
 with the strongest member at most reaching the mid-stage of Nirvana Shatterer.
